relayERC20(address,address,address,uint2.details: Tokens are minted on the destination chain.

params._from: Address of the msg.sender of sendERC20 on the source chain.

sendERC20(address,address,uint256,uint25.details: Tokens are burned on the source chain.

params._chainId: Chain ID of the destination chain.

relayERC20(address,address,address,uint2.notice: Relays tokens received from another chain.

sendERC20(address,address,uint256,uint25.notice: Sends tokens to a target address on another chain.

relayERC20(address,address,address,uint2.notice: Relays tokens received from another chain.

sendERC20(address,address,uint256,uint25.notice: Sends tokens to a target address on another chain.

RelayERC20(address,address,address,uint2.notice: Emitted whenever tokens are successfully relayed on this chain.

SendERC20(address,address,address,uint25.notice: Emitted when tokens are sent from one chain to another.

InvalidCrossDomainSender().notice: Thrown when attempting to relay a message and the cross domain message sender is not the SuperchainTokenBridge.

InvalidERC7802().notice: Thrown when attempting to use a token that does not implement the ERC7802 interface.

ZeroAddress().notice: Thrown when attempting to perform an operation and the account is the zero address.

userdoc.notice: The SuperchainTokenBridge allows for the bridging of ERC20 tokens to make them fungible across the         Superchain. It builds on top of the L2ToL2CrossDomainMessenger for both replay protection and domain         binding.

relayERC20(address,address,address,uint2.details: Tokens are minted on the destination chain.

params._from: Address of the msg.sender of sendERC20 on the source chain.

sendERC20(address,address,uint256,uint25.details: Tokens are burned on the source chain.

params._chainId: Chain ID of the destination chain.

params.from: Address of the msg.sender of sendERC20 on the source chain.
params.source: Chain ID of the source chain.

params.destination: Chain ID of the destination chain.
